commands.review_summary:
The PR caches reusable WinUI TextBlock inlines/font resources and changes tray chat tool-output cards so only the header toggles expansion while the body remains selectable.

Reproducibility: no. live UI reproduction was run in this read-only Linux review. The click-to-collapse path is source-reproducible because current master wraps header and body in one Button, while the hover text-vanish path is supported by the current TextBlock/render-setter structure but was not observed directly.
